prompt: Perfect facial harmony. Masterpiece, ultra-high quality, extreme high resolution, ultra-fine details, stunning realism, 8K detail, surreal photography, realistic iPhone 17 Pro photo quality, RAW photo, amateur aesthetic, snapshot, unprofessional composition, natural lighting, rich details, slight grain, imperfect textures. A young woman with youthful femininity. The image is a sophisticated, classic front-facing close-up selfie taken in a cozy indoor setting, captured from a direct frontal angle, highlighting a soft feminine look that blends simplicity with warm elegance. She sits in a relaxed pose, leaning against soft pillows, head slightly tilted, looking directly into the camera with a soft, neutral expression. She wears a simple, tight-fitting black camisole, with thin straps and a wide scoop neck elegantly accentuating her neck and shoulders. She wears a very delicate gold chain with a heart pendant and large gold hoop earrings, adding a touch of timeless feminine charm. Her dark hair is casually styled in a relaxed bun, with long, soft wavy bangs framing her face and forehead. Her skin is fresh and hydrated, with a warm peach-pink blush for a natural glow, thick upturned lashes, fine eyeliner, naturally shaped brows, and soft matte nude-pink lips. She is seated in a warm indoor environment, behind her is a thin white curtain with soft vertical folds, while part of a heavy emerald velvet curtain appears on the right of the background, creating a rich and warm color contrast. Soft, diffused indoor light gently highlights her facial features and flawless skin, while creating a subtle halo on her gold jewelry, without harsh or distracting shadows. The image has a soft, slightly hazy texture, mimicking a film camera or a subtle vintage filter effect. A classic glowing white numerical timestamp is vertically printed in the lower-left corner of the image, showing the date: "25-03-11". Aspect ratio 9:16, natural skin texture, no artificial plastic feel.

promptZh: 完美的五官比例。杰作，超高质量，极高分辨率，超精细细节，惊人的真实感，8K 细节，超现实摄影，iPhone 17 Pro 真实照片质量，RAW 原片，业余美学，快照，非专业构图，自然光，丰富的细节，轻微颗粒感，不完美的纹理。一位具有 青春女性特质 的年轻女性。这张照片是一张精致、经典的正面特写自拍，拍摄于舒适的室内环境，采用直接的正面角度，突显出一种融合了简约与温暖优雅的柔美外观。她姿态放松地坐着，靠在柔软的枕头上，头部微微倾斜，直视镜头，表情柔和自然。她穿着一件 简约的紧身黑色吊带背心，细肩带和大圆领优雅地衬托出她的颈部和肩部线条。她佩戴着 一条精致的心形吊坠金项链和一对大金耳圈，增添了一抹永恒的女性魅力。深色头发随意地扎成一个松散的发髻，长而柔和的波浪刘海修饰着脸庞和额头。她的皮肤清新水润，带有温暖的桃粉色腮红，呈现自然光泽，浓密上翘的睫毛，精致的眼线，自然形状的眉毛，以及柔和的哑光裸粉色嘴唇。她坐在一处温暖的室内环境中，身后是带有柔和垂直褶皱的白色薄窗帘，背景右侧露出部分厚重的祖母绿丝绒窗帘，形成了丰富而温暖的色彩对比。柔和、漫射的室内光线轻轻勾勒出她的面部特征和无瑕肌肤，并在她的金饰上营造出微妙的光晕，没有刺眼或分散注意力的阴影。图像具有柔和、轻微朦胧的质感，模仿了胶片相机或微妙的复古滤镜效果。图像左下角垂直印有经典的白色发光数字时间戳，显示日期为："25-03-11"。纵横比 9:16，自然皮肤纹理，无人工塑料感。
